name: Brown Corpus
note: Rounded benchmark; Brown is commonly described as over one million words.

name: Penn Treebank WSJ
note: Rounded benchmark for the one-million-word Wall Street Journal material.

name: CHILDES Brown Adam
note: Gold-token count from the UD English-CHILDES subset, not the full raw CHILDES corpus.

name: CHILDES Brown Eve
note: Gold-token count from the UD English-CHILDES subset, not the full raw CHILDES corpus.

name: CHILDES Brown Sarah
note: Gold-token count from the UD English-CHILDES subset, not the full raw CHILDES corpus.

name: CHILDES Brown Adam+Eve+Sarah
note: Sum of the Adam, Eve, and Sarah gold-token counts listed above.
